analysis.name: Alice
analysis.summary: ALICE是IC生态AI DAO代币，市值约115万美元，流动性仅4.2万美元，24h交易量极低。近期无重大利好，价格处于ATH下跌96%后的低位横盘。基本面概念新颖但无实际收入，合约风险高，不推荐买入。

latestNews.title: ALICE Price Jumps 19.31%: Altcoin Rotation Sparks Momentum
latestNews.reason: 新闻提及价格跳涨，但为6月20日旧闻，当前价格已回落，无持续催化

latestNews.title: ALICE Defies Broader Crypto Caution with a Fresh Surge: Is Altcoin Rotation Here to Stay?
latestNews.reason: 6月21日新闻，描述短期上涨，但缺乏基本面支撑

fundamentals: Alice是IC生态上的AI驱动DAO，管理bob.fun等平台，通过AI进行买卖、销毁等操作
代币总供应量4200万，全稀释估值约115万美元，但流通量显示为0，数据矛盾
无实际收入或TVL，项目处于实验阶段
代币价格从ATH 0.1836美元下跌96%以上
marketRead: 当前价格0.1156美元，24h下跌2.07%，交易量仅4386美元，流动性4.2万美元
价格在0.11-0.12美元区间窄幅震荡，无突破迹象
成交量极低，市场关注度低，容易被操纵
risks: 流动性极低（4.2万美元），大额买卖易滑点或无法成交
合约风险：未开源或未审计，存在Rug Pull可能
项目无实际收入，估值完全依赖叙事
新闻多为旧闻或无关内容，缺乏近期利好
代币供应数据矛盾（流通量为0但市值非0）
watchlist: 是否有新的AI DAO功能上线或合作
sourceNotes: 数据来自DexScreener和CoinGecko，但流通供应量为0，市值计算可能不准确
新闻中混杂My Neighbor Alice等其他项目，需区分

profile.name: Alice
profile.description: The ALICE SNS DAO is an experimental, AI-driven decentralized autonomous organization (DAO) designed to manage and grow the Bob ecosystem, including platforms like bob.fun, launch.bob.fun, and alice.fun. Acting as both the governing brain and a strategic fund manager, ALICE uses artificial intelligence to make decisions such as buying, selling, launching, or burning tokens based on real-time market data and social sentiment. Its tokenomics focus on decentralization, rewarding loyalty, and fostering community engagement, with AI transparency maintained through active communication on social platforms. At its core, ALICE combines governance, investment, and wit to create an innovative, self-governing crypto experiment.
